iowa.example_clue: It's the only state whose name begins with 2 vowels

a snapping turtle.example_clue: Stand back! This turtle that has a pretty good bite with its hooked beak is the state reptile of New York

delaware.example_clue: In land area it ranks 49th in the nation

the land of 10,000 lakes.example_clue: Despite this nickname for Minnesota, the state actually boasts many more

kamehameha.example_clue: On June 11 Hawaii celebrates this great king with a parade & other festivities

the red sea.example_clue: The Gulf of Aqaba & the Gulf of Suez are arms of it

the rhône.example_clue: The Arve River has its origins on Mont Blanc & flows into this river near Geneva

mount rainier.example_clue: George Vancouver named this peak that's southeast of Tacoma for his fellow naval officer Peter

richmond.example_clue: This city on the James River is home to the Robert E. Lee House & the home of Chief Justice John Marshall

riyadh.example_clue: This capital city at the junction of 2 wadis is home to more than 15,000 mosques

cleveland.example_clue: The Rock & Roll Hall of Fame & Museum

serra.example_clue: Without the "I" that Spanish uses, it's the Portuguese word for a jagged mountain range; the one da Mantiqueira is in Brazil's south

brasília.example_clue: Carved out of Goiás State, this city of about 3 million is found within the Distrito Federal

bolivia.example_clue: Brazil's longest land border, about 2,100 miles, is shared with this landlocked nation

são paulo.example_clue: This city of 12 million in the southeast was named in 1554 on the anniversary of the conversion of an apostle

amazonas.example_clue: Manaus is the capital of this largely rainforest state that adds 2 letters to the name of the river that runs through it

time zones.example_clue: Though it has only one official one, China spans 5 of these east to west

india.example_clue: Though it lost about 350,000 square miles of territory in 1947, it was still the world's 7th-largest country

tierra del fuego.example_clue: Argentina spans more than 2,000 miles from Jujuy province in the north to this island province down south

western australia.example_clue: It's the apt name of the nearly one million square mile area seen here

oblasts.example_clue: "O", I hope you know Russia has 46 of these provinces, from an old Slavonic word meaning "empire"

cairo.example_clue: An obelisk located in the northeast of this big city memorializes the ancient site of Heliopolis

casablanca.example_clue: If you travel by sea to this, Morocco's main port city, you can take a train from there to Tangier

columbia & charleston.example_clue: They're the 2 cities that have served as South Carolina's capital

chihuahua.example_clue: In Northern Mexico, a capital city, a state & a desert all have this name

cardiff.example_clue: "Doctor Who" fans know that this Welsh city is the home base for production

bavaria.example_clue: It 's Germany's largest state in area

bogotá.example_clue: Panama City lies about 470 miles northwest of this other capital

bimini.example_clue: The Bahamas include these other "B" islands that lie about 50 miles off the coast of Florida

the berkshires.example_clue: Mount Greylock, the highest point in Massachusetts, is part of this range

the brahmaputra.example_clue: Beginning in the Himalayas, this big river flows some 1,800 miles before joining the Ganges & emptying into the Bay of Bengal

south korea.example_clue: Its northern end roughly follows the 38th parallel from the mouth of the Han River to the town of Kosong

argentina.example_clue: It has the highest & lowest points in all of the Americas

oman.example_clue: There are at least 8 "A"s, "E"s, "I"s & "U"s but this is the only U.N. member that starts with "O"

kenya.example_clue: The Mau Escarpment is a rampart along the western rim of the Great Rift Valley in this country

myanmar.example_clue: Nay Pyi Taw was purpose built in 2005 & declared the new capital of this nation in 2006

grace.example_clue: Be close to God in a state of this, the name of a Monégasque princess

shock.example_clue: It precedes "jock" to help describe a provocative talk-radio DJ

equilibrium.example_clue: Let's even out opposing forces to produce an absence of change & get things in this 11-letter word

confusion.example_clue: Let's get you out of a state of this, bewilderment; there's a matrix for it in machine learning

affairs.example_clue: A series of illicit liaisons or in a very separate meaning, public events

colorado.example_clue: How about Aurora in this state, founded in 1891 during a silver mining boom

paris, texas.example_clue: The 65-foot landmark replica seen here is found in this city northeast of Dallas

olympia.example_clue: Greek heritage? How about this, the capital of a West Coast state

oklahoma.example_clue: The seat of Garfield County, Enid in this state is located at a watering place on the Chisholm Trail

alexandria.example_clue: George Washington helped lay out this place on the Potomac & drilled troops there during the French & Indian War

sherwood.example_clue: Associated with an outlaw hero of medieval legend, this forest once covered about 1/5 of Nottinghamshire County

wales.example_clue: Known for its volcanic rock mountains, like 3,500-foot Yr Wyddfa , Eryri National Park is found in this UK country

edinburgh.example_clue: Castle Rock & Arthur's Seat are 2 of the "Seven Hills of" this Scottish city

liverpool.example_clue: Chartered by King John in 1207, this city lies on the northern shore of the River Mersey a few miles from the Irish Sea

loch lomond.example_clue: Loch Ness & this other bonnie, bonnie loch are the 2 largest lakes in Scotland

the mackenzie.example_clue: The towns of Fort Providence & Inuvik, as shown here

the pacific & indian.example_clue: These 2 oceans lap at Australia's easternmost & westernmost shores

the tropic of capricorn.example_clue: Australia lies in the Southern Hemisphere, roughly split by this major line of latitude

sydney.example_clue: See many of those wild & weird Aussie animals at the Taronga Zoo in this coastal metropolis, the most populous city

the outback.example_clue: Aka the Never-Never, this 2.1-million-square-mile region is where explorer Ludwig Leichhardt & his team disappeared in 1848

tasmania.example_clue: This island off Australia's southern coast makes up most of its smallest state

malaysia.example_clue: After gaining self-government, Sarawak joined this country in 1963 & became a state

the departments.example_clue: Mainland France has 12 metropolitan regions that are further divided into 94 of these, like Hautes-Alpes

rwanda.example_clue: This country is sometimes called "Land of a Thousand Hills" & its capital Kigali is built on several of them

the appalachian valley.example_clue: Stretching from Canada to Alabama, this lengthy valley includes the Cumberland Valley

the rhine & the rhône.example_clue: Britannica calls these 2 bodies of water that differ by a letter Switzerland's 2 most important rivers

nunavut.example_clue: Canada's geographic center is in or near a lake in this easternmost Arctic territory

the caspian sea.example_clue: The ancients called this body of water the Hyrcanian Sea; clever Herodotus thought it had no outlet to the ocean

the blue mountains.example_clue: On Jamaica a more than 7,400-foot peak is named for this "colorful" range

sudan.example_clue: A part of the Sahara called the Nubian Desert is largely in the northeastern part of this country

the governor.example_clue: In every U.S. state & commonwealth, this head of the executive branch is directly elected by the people

alabama.example_clue: This state's constitution, based largely on one drafted in Montgomery in 1901, is thought to be the longest in the world

louisiana.example_clue: This state has civil law based on French & Spanish law, a holdover from its colonial past

an (state) auditor.example_clue: Washington & Maine each have a state one of these officials to examine accounting records

boroughs.example_clue: Local governments mostly have 2 tiers: cities & towns, aka municipalities, & counties, which in Alaska are called these

austin.example_clue: The South by Southwest Conference is a big draw in this city

auckland.example_clue: Beautiful Waitemada Harbour can be found in this, New Zealand's most populous city

asheville.example_clue: This North Carolina city is the eastern gateway to the Great Smoky Mountains

aberdeen.example_clue: Great Scot! It sits upon the Rivers Dee & Don on the North Sea

aqaba.example_clue: In 1917 T.E. Lawrence helped capture this Jordanian port town on a gulf of the same name

bruce springsteen.example_clue: This singer tells Sandy that "Fireworks are hailing over Little Eden tonight" in "4th Of July, Asbury Park"

\"empire state of mind\".example_clue: Not to snitch, but Jay-Z references Harlem, Tribeca & a stash spot on 560 State Street -- that's right, officer, 560 State -- in this song

\"black and yellow\".example_clue: Wiz Khalifa reps Pittsburgh in this song, also the 2 colors of the city's Steelers

long beach city.example_clue: The Dove Shack had a hit with "Summertime In The LBC" -- LBC is short for this California city, home of Vince Staples & Snoop Dogg

nwa.example_clue: On the first track off the same-named album, this 3-initialed group came "Straight Outta Compton"

wyoming.example_clue: Behold the majesty at the National Elk Refuge adjoining Grand Teton National Park in this state

the yukon territory.example_clue: Mount Augusta isn't in Georgia -- or Maine for that matter -- it's in Alaska on the state's border with this Canadian territory

tortugas.example_clue: The last of Florida's Keys are a group of 7 islands known as the "Dry" these

columbia.example_clue: Congaree National Park is roughly 20 miles southeast of this southern capital

sierra madre.example_clue: Three connected ranges of these mountains form a backbone through Mexico

baja california & yucatán.example_clue: Mexico's 2 largest peninsulas, they are found on opposite sides of the country

roma.example_clue: Showcased in a 2018 movie by Alfonso Cuarón, it's the name for a trendy neighborhood near the center of Mexico City

chiapas.example_clue: This southern Mexican state is known for the Mayan ruins of Palenque & Bonampak & as the site of the Zapatista uprising

zacatecas.example_clue: Alphabetically, Mexico's states run from Aguascalientes in the center to this "Z" one to the north
